# Network Security Policy v1 (Archived)

Legacy network security policy, superseded and archived.

All network access must be logged and reviewed monthly.
VPN is required for all remote connections.

## Network Access

- All access logged
- Monthly review by IT security
- VPN mandatory for remote work
